task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder named 'Newsletter-Material' is visible in the folder pane of the email client.

task_completion.description: Move exactly 3 emails into the 'Newsletter-Material' folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Newsletter-Material' folder is open or selected, and the message list shows exactly 3 emails inside it.

task_completion.description: Ensure the selected emails include messages from at least 2 different mailing lists
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sender addresses, mailing list tags in the subjects (e.g., [SAdev], [ILUG]), or headers of the 3 emails in the 'Newsletter-Material' folder show at least two distinct mailing list sources.
An email composition window is open with 'subscribers@tech-weekly.com' entered in the 'To' field.

task_completion.description: Set the draft subject to 'Tech Weekly Digest - Issue 42'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Subject' field of the draft email contains exactly 'Tech Weekly Digest - Issue 42'.

task_completion.description: List the exact subject line and a one-sentence summary for each of the 3 selected emails in the draft
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body of the draft email contains three distinct entries. Each entry includes an exact subject line matching one of the 3 selected emails and a corresponding one-sentence summary.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical email client to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI email application (e.g., Thunderbird, Evolution) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used existing emails from the inbox rather than creating fake ones
integrity.visual_evidence: The emails moved to the 'Newsletter-Material' folder appear to be pre-existing mailing list emails (e.g., from the Apache SpamAssassin corpus) and not newly composed by the agent.

integrity.description: The agent generated actual summaries rather than placeholder text
integrity.visual_evidence: The summaries in the draft email body are distinct, coherent sentences that appear to describe the content of their respective emails, not copy-pasted identical strings or generic placeholders.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target folder name must be exactly 'Newsletter-Material'. The target folder must contain exactly 3 emails. The selected emails must originate from at least 2 distinct mailing list sources. The draft email recipient must be 'subscribers@tech-weekly.com'. The draft email subject must contain 'Tech Weekly Digest' (specifically 'Tech Weekly Digest - Issue 42').
